description: Every FAA aircraft lookup the registry website offers, plus a daily-synced offline copy of the entire US registry that unlocks fleet reports, hex decoding, ownership history, and expiration alerts no other tool has.

novel_features.name: Fleet composition report
novel_features.description: One command turns an owner name into a full fleet profile: aircraft count, model mix, jet/turboprop/piston split, average seats and year built.

novel_features.name: Batch Mode S hex resolution
novel_features.description: Resolve any number of ADS-B Mode S hex codes (args or stdin) to N-numbers, aircraft types, and owners — offline.

novel_features.name: Aircraft ownership history
novel_features.description: Chronological owner timeline for a tail number, stitching current registration with every deregistration record.

novel_features.name: Expiring registrations
novel_features.description: List registrations expiring within a window, filtered by owner or state, sorted soonest-first.

novel_features.name: Model-class fleet breakdown
novel_features.description: For any make/model, break down every registered example by registrant type (corporate, individual, LLC, co-owned) and state.

novel_features.name: Offline N-number availability
novel_features.description: Check whether an N-number is assigned, reserved, or free — computed locally, with the reason.
